materials: DK yarn in the colour(s) of your choice
A button if you aren't going to crochet one

rounds.summary: Chain 12 stitches to form the foundation of the case.
rounds.title: Foundation Chain

rounds.rawInstruction: 2 HTC in first stitch, 1 HTC in each of the next 8 stitches, 2HTC in the next stitch, working in the other side of the chain, 2 HTC in the next stitch, 1HTC in each of the next 8 stitches, 2 HTC in the last stitch, join to the 1st HTC.
rounds.summary: Work increases at both ends of the chain to create an oval base, working on both sides of the foundation chain.
rounds.title: Round 1

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 HTC in each stitch all the way around (24)
rounds.summary: Work a half treble crochet in every stitch around, for five rounds.
rounds.title: Rounds 2-6

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 DC in each stitch all the way around (24)
rounds.summary: Work a double crochet in every stitch around to create a decorative row.
rounds.title: Round 7

rounds.rawInstruction: Now we will begin to work the flap, from here on we will be working in rows back and forth.
rounds.summary: Transition from working in the round to working in rows for the flap.
rounds.title: Begin working in rows

rounds.rawInstruction: 1DC, 1DC, CH 2, turn, 1 HTC in the next 10 stitches, CH 2, turn. (10)
rounds.summary: Work two double crochets, chain 2 as turning chain, then work half treble crochets across the row.
rounds.title: Row 1

rounds.rawInstruction: 1 HTC in each stitch all the way across, CH 2, turn (10)
rounds.summary: Work a half treble crochet in every stitch across, chain 2 and turn, for eight rows.
rounds.title: Rows 2-9

rounds.rawInstruction: 2HTCtog, 1HTC, 1HTC, CH2, skip the next 2 stitches, 1HTC, 1HTC, 2HTCtog, CH2, turn (8)
rounds.summary: Work decreases at both ends and create a buttonhole by chaining and skipping stitches in the centre.
rounds.title: Row 10

rounds.summary: Work a half treble crochet in every stitch across, then fasten off.
rounds.title: Row 11

rounds.summary: Create a magic ring as the foundation for the button.
rounds.title: Magic Ring

rounds.summary: Work 12 treble crochets into the magic ring and join to form a circle.
rounds.title: Round 1

rounds.summary: Work a slip stitch in every stitch around to create a finished edge.
rounds.title: Round 2

rounds.rawInstruction: Line the button up with where the button hole on the flap lies when in position at the front of the pouch, (you can mark this with a stitch marker) and sew into place.
rounds.summary: Align the button with the buttonhole on the flap and sew it onto the front of the case.
rounds.title: Sew button to case

rounds.summary: Weave in all remaining yarn ends to finish the project.
rounds.title: Weave in ends
